title: Harry Styles Reveals He’s on This Dating App — But It’s Not for the Reason You Think
summary: The singer also shared during his Royal Court appearance which odd habit "shocks" his friends.
body: Per the first half of the title of his upcoming album, Harry Styles prefers to kiss all the time. So naturally, the pop star is on a dating app. Related Harry Styles to Return to ‘Saturday Night Live’ as Host & Musical Guest 7 Years After His Debut Here’s Everything We Know About Harry Styles’ New Album ‘Kiss All the Time. Disco, Occasionally’ (So Far) Harry Styles on His Love for Italy and How He’s Slowing Down After Hiatus While appearing on an episode of Brittany Broski’s Royal Court posted Wednesday (Feb. 25), Styles revealed that he’s on Raya — a private, members-only matchmaking platform — while talking about how he’s picked up some Italian while spending time in Rome recently. Explaining how he practices the language, the singer said he does it by “mostly just talking with friends, and I do a little bit of the app, too — Raya.” After Broski and her crew burst out laughing, Styles quipped mischievously, “Just for grammar and stuff — it’s good to be seeing [the language] all the time. Just being immersed in it is the best way to learn.” The interview comes just more than a w…
